ops.title: capt-hook 9.9.0 attach-only pack contract replaces the byte-identical doctrine; four consumer artifacts, pack lint, dependency mechanics gotchas
ops.body:
**capt-hook attach-only pack contract, shipped 2026-07-13 (capt-hook 9.9.0).** The byte-identical doctrine (consumers mirroring `capt-hook run <Event>` entries, relying on Claude Code's exact-string dedup) is RETIRED — the dedup is per-source (claude-code#76297) and the doctrine broke in production within 9 days when 9.7.0 changed the prefix to `uvx --isolated`. The captain-hook plugin is the sole dispatcher; a pack-shipping plugin carries exactly four artifacts:

1. `capt-hook.toml` (unchanged)
2. hooks.json with a single capt-hook entry — SessionStart `uvx --isolated capt-hook pack attach "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"` (`/hooks` when the manifest is nested); zero `run` entries
3. plugin.json `"dependencies": [{ "name": "captain-hook", "marketplace": "captain-hook", "version": ">=9.9.0" }]` (object form + version floor required by lint)
4. consumer marketplace.json `"allowCrossMarketplaceDependenciesOn": ["captain-hook"]` — LOAD-BEARING: absence fails OPEN silently (dep skipped at install, CC 2.1.207)

`capt-hook pack lint <plugin-root>` is the CI check (pass the plugin ROOT even for nested manifests; pin it — `uvx 'capt-hook>=9.9.0'` and on runners with old default Python add `--python 3.13`, because bare uvx serves stale pre-9.9.0 envs two ways: cached tool env, and python-version backtracking). Packs must not subscribe SessionStart (attach and dispatch are unordered sibling hooks); `async_=True` on decision events raises at registration.

**Why:** consumer-mirrored dispatch entries double-fire decision gates (getaway's Stop gate dispatched twice) and strand every consumer on prefix changes.

**How to apply:** new pack-shipping plugins copy the four artifacts + lint line (canonical guide: captain-hook docs/guide/plugin-packs.qmd; reference: repo-bootstrap reference/hooks.md). Install story: `claude plugin marketplace add yasyf/captain-hook` BEFORE install (marketplace is not auto-bootstrapped; unresolvable dep = whole plugin fails to load, skills included). Upgrades: `claude plugin update` silently skips newly-added dependencies — marketplace-add + re-run `claude plugin install`. Migrated: getaway 0.9.0, cc-context 0.14.0, cc-present 0.8.1. The once-guard survives only as a legacy shim with an inline deletion manifest (delete when the #76297 fix ships at fleet-min CC and legacy caches decay). Related: [[plugin-cache-keys-on-version]], [[hook-multi-fire-was-multi-source-registration]].
